name: messages_create
description: Send a message to a conversation as an agent, bot, or on behalf of a contact.

parameters.name: content
parameters.example: Thank you for reaching out! Let me look into this.

parameters.name: private
parameters.description: If true, message is internal note only visible to agents.

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: Content type: text, input_select, cards, form, article.

body.content: Thank you for reaching out! Let me look into this.
